So now we've taken like all these audiences and we've sliced and diced them and like all of these various ways, which is really pretty awesome. And I guarantee you some of these are going to be terrible, you know, and like some of them might not even spend the budget. You never know. Some of those keyword ones that might end up being too small of an audience, we're just going to have to see, you know, and that's why you want to test a lot of different ones at once. And again, I know my numbers, which is why I'm willing to bid 70 bucks and do $100 a day. I wouldn't recommend that to start out with. So you do whatever is comfortable for you. Especially if you're spending less than 50 bucks a day on one of them. And if you try, you know, if you don't follow that bidding strategy of like, you know, bid a little like three and a half times more than what you're willing to pay, you probably won't pay that much. If you don't do that, then it's just not going to spend any money. So you want to make sure you're doing that. But I think we're going to let this sit for a while and see what happens. All right.
